title: Spilotantha staaliana
taxonomy: Spilotantha staaliana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. It is a genus of plants that are native to southern Africa. The classification of Spilotantha staaliana is further broken down into its kingdom as Plantae, its phylum as Magnoliophyta, its class as Magnoliopsida, and its order as Fabales. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants. The Polygalaceae family is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as milkworts.
